solution_criteria: All meals are vegan with no animal products
All meals are gluten-free with no wheat, barley, or rye
No tree nuts or peanuts in any meal
Meal plan is compact and covers breakfast, lunch, and dinner
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for an individual.
scenario: Testing with dietary restrictions: Create a 1-day meal plan for someone with multiple constraints (vegan, gluten-free, and nut allergies) to verify the prompt respects and incorporates all specified limitations

solution_criteria: Meal plan uses only these 7 pantry staples: rice, beans, eggs, onions, salt, oil, and canned tomatoes
Includes three distinct meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner) that are practical and edible
All meals are nutritionally balanced and appropriate for the individual's profile
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for an individual.
scenario: Testing with minimal ingredient availability: Generate a meal plan for someone with access to only 5-7 basic pantry staples to assess whether the prompt creates practical, realistic meals within tight resource constraints

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
Provides high protein content (minimum 1.6g per kg body weight) suitable for endurance training
Includes at least 3 different meals with varied food sources
All meals are practical and quick to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for an individual.
scenario: Testing with specific health/fitness goals: Create a 1-day meal plan for an individual training for endurance athletics with specific macronutrient targets (high protein, moderate carbs) to verify the prompt balances nutritional requirements with meal variety
